title: Lightium
description: A Custom Mod That Gives u Lightium Items! Trade With A Toolsmith Or A Wandering Trader To Get It!
body:
This mod gives a new type of ore that is called lightium. you can get this ore by trading with an Toolsmith and an wandering trader. if you traded successfully with the villager you can get a light gem or a light string with that you can craft the lightium armor and tools! you can get with 1 light gem mana, mana can be used as ab projectile for the mana crossbow and light bow! if you have an full set of lightium armor (tools, weapons, ect). press ''X'' to unlock the lightium power, have fun!

------------------------------------THIS MOD DOES NOT GIVE YOU-------------------------------------
X-ray or the ability to see through opaque blocks
aim bot or aim assist
flight, speed, or other movement modifications
automatic PvP
active client-side hiding of third party modifications that have server-side opt-outs
item duplication
IT DOES NOT WORK ON MULTIPLAYER SERVERS only single player servers UNLESS all players in YOUR server have the mod
